moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stage Begins
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage concludes today, with the highly anticipated knockout rounds kicking off tomorrow, June 29th, in North America.

angles.name: Knockout excitement
angles.copy: The group stage drama is done! It's win or go home as the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout rounds begin tomorrow. Who are you backing for glory? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: UK team focus
angles.copy: After a nail-biting group stage, the World Cup knockouts are here! Will any of the Home Nations make a deep run? Catch all the action from tomorrow.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The debut Blenheim Palace Festival in Oxfordshire is in full swing, featuring major artists like Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé, Teddy Swims, Lauren Spencer-Smith, and Pete Tong Ibiza Classics through July 4th.

angles.name: Big names at Blenheim
angles.copy: What a line-up! The Blenheim Palace Festival is bringing huge stars to Oxfordshire this week. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Nineties Icons at Blenheim
angles.copy: Alanis Morissette at Blenheim Palace Festival? Yes please! Get ready for some Jagged Little Pill classics.

moments.title: ATEEZ Live at BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: South Korean boy band ATEEZ are performing live at BST Hyde Park in London today, June 28th, as part of the festival's star-studded 2026 lineup.

angles.name: K-Pop takes Hyde Park
angles.copy: London is buzzing! K-Pop sensations ATEEZ are lighting up BST Hyde Park today. Who's there to see them? #BSTHydePark #ATEEZ

angles.name: Live Music in London
angles.copy: Another huge day for live music in the capital! ATEEZ are on stage at BST Hyde Park today. What's your favourite live music venue?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Tennis Championships kick off tomorrow, June 29th, bringing two weeks of top-tier tennis to London.

angles.name: Tennis fever hits London
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon starts tomorrow, bringing the world's best tennis players to SW19. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: Summer of Sport Continues
angles.copy: From football to tennis, the summer of sport is in full swing! Wimbledon begins tomorrow – who's excited for two weeks of grass-court action?

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated on Friday, June 26th, with new entries from artists like Olivia Rodrigo, LE SSERAFIM x ILLIT x KATSEYE, and Shakira & Burna Boy making waves.

angles.name: Chart rundown
angles.copy: Did your favourite make the cut? The latest Official UK Singles Chart dropped on Friday! Who's holding strong at the top?

angles.name: New music on the chart
angles.copy: New music alert! Olivia Rodrigo, LE SSERAFIM x ILLIT x KATSEYE, and Shakira & Burna Boy are among the new entries on this week's UK Singles Chart. What are you listening to?

moments.title: Mel Brooks is 100 Today
moments.blurb: Legendary comedian, director, and actor Mel Brooks celebrates his 100th birthday today, June 28th, known for classics like 'Blazing Saddles' and 'Young Frankenstein'.

angles.name: Comedy legend turns 100
angles.copy: Happy 100th Birthday to the one and only Mel Brooks! What's your favourite Mel Brooks movie or moment?

moments.title: Kathy Bates is 78 Today
moments.blurb: Oscar-winning actress Kathy Bates, known for her powerful roles in films like 'Misery' and 'Titanic', celebrates her 78th birthday today, June 28th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Kathy Bates
angles.copy: From 'Misery' to 'Titanic', a huge Happy 78th Birthday to the incredible Kathy Bates! What's your favourite performance of hers?

moments.title: John Cusack is 60 Today
moments.blurb: Actor John Cusack, star of beloved films such as 'Say Anything...' and 'High Fidelity', celebrates his 60th birthday today, June 28th.

angles.name: Happy 60th John Cusack
angles.copy: Still holding that boombox high! Happy 60th Birthday to the iconic John Cusack. What's your favourite of his movies?

moments.title: Jude Bellingham Turns 23
moments.blurb: England and Real Madrid football star Jude Bellingham celebrates his 23rd birthday tomorrow, June 29th, amidst the FIFA World Cup.

angles.name: Bellingham's Big Day
angles.copy: A huge Happy 23rd Birthday to England's midfield maestro, Jude Bellingham, tomorrow! What a year he's had.

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger is 47
moments.blurb: Singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for her work with the Pussycat Dolls and as a judge on 'The X Factor', turns 47 tomorrow, June 29th.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll's Birthday
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish her a Happy Birthday? Nicole Scherzinger turns 47 tomorrow! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

moments.title: Debbie Harry Turns 81
moments.blurb: Blondie frontwoman and rock icon Debbie Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st, continuing her legendary career in music.

angles.name: Blondie Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Call Me! The incredible Debbie Harry turns 81 on Monday. What's your ultimate Blondie anthem?

moments.title: Missy Elliott is 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott will celebrate her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Get Ur Freak On for Missy
angles.copy: Work It! The legendary Missy Elliott turns 55 on Monday. Drop your favourite Missy track in the comments!

moments.title: Margot Robbie Turns 36
moments.blurb: Acclaimed actress and producer Margot Robbie, known for 'Barbie' and 'The Wolf of Wall Street', celebrates her 36th birthday on July 2nd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Barbie!
angles.copy: She's everything! Happy 36th Birthday to the brilliant Margot Robbie on Thursday. What's your favourite of her roles?

moments.title: Tom Cruise is 64
moments.blurb: Hollywood superstar Tom Cruise, famous for the 'Mission: Impossible' franchise and 'Top Gun', celebrates his 64th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Mission: Birthday!
angles.copy: He's still got it! Happy 64th Birthday to the one and only Tom Cruise on Friday. What's your favourite Tom Cruise movie?

moments.title: London Pride Parade Takes Over Capital
moments.blurb: The annual London Pride Parade will fill the streets of the capital with celebration and colour on Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Pride in London
angles.copy: London will be buzzing with joy and colour for the annual Pride Parade this Saturday! Get ready to celebrate love and diversity.

angles.name: Celebrating Pride
angles.copy: A huge weekend for London as the city gets ready for the Pride Parade on Saturday! We're sending love to everyone celebrating.
